name: 03-human-in-the-loop
description: A tutorial project demonstrating Human-in-the-loop review with a rich form, Gate-based branching, and the WeaveMind browser extension.
weftCode:
# Project: 03-human-in-the-loop
# Description: A tutorial project demonstrating Human-in-the-loop review with a rich form, Gate-based branching, and the WeaveMind browser extension.

tutorial_note = Annotation {
  content: ```
## 🐦 Human in the Loop Tutorial

This project shows how to pause execution for human review and resume it from the browser extension.

### Setup

1. **Install the WeaveMind browser extension** (Chrome/Firefox)
2. Open the extension and **create an API token** in your WeaveMind dashboard
3. Paste the token into the extension settings
4. **Run this project**, it will pause at the "Review" step
5. Open the extension, you'll see a pending task. Click it to open the review form
6. Fill in the form and submit. The project resumes automatically!

👉 [Install the WeaveMind browser extension](https://app.weavemind.ai/app#/extension)

The **Human** node pauses execution and sends a form to the extension. The **Gate** node only lets data through if the reviewer approved.
  ```
}

user_name = Text {
  label: "Customer Name"
  value: "Alice Johnson"
}

user_request = Text {
  label: "Support Request"
  value: "I'd like a refund for order #4821. The item arrived damaged and I've attached photos."
}

analyze_ticket = Group(name: String, request: String) -> (summary: String, category: String, urgency: String, suggested_response: String) {
  # Builds a prompt from customer name and request, sends it to an LLM
  # for structured analysis, and parses the JSON response into individual
  # fields: summary, category, urgency, and suggested_response.

  llm_config = LlmConfig {
    label: "LLM Config"
    model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4"
    temperature: 0.2
    systemPrompt: ```
You are a support ticket analyst. Given a customer name and their support request, produce a JSON object with these fields:
- "summary": a one-sentence summary of the issue
- "category": one of "Refund", "Technical", "Billing", "General"
- "urgency": one of "Low", "Medium", "High"
- "suggested_response": a short, professional draft reply to the customer
Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown.
    ```
  }

  prompt_text = Text {
    label: "Prompt Template"
    value: ```
Customer: {{name}}

Request:
{{request}}
    ```
  }

  prompt_template = Template(name: String, request: String) {
    label: "Build Prompt"
  }
  prompt_template.template = prompt_text.value
  prompt_template.name = self.name
  prompt_template.request = self.request

  analyzer = LlmInference -> (response: JsonDict) {
    label: "Analyze Ticket"
    parseJson: true
  }
  analyzer.prompt = prompt_template.text
  analyzer.config = llm_config.config

  parse_analysis = ExecPython(analysis: JsonDict) -> (summary: String, category: String, urgency: String, suggested_response: String) {
    label: "Parse Analysis"
    code: ```
return {
    "summary": analysis.get("summary", "No summary available"),
    "category": analysis.get("category", "General"),
    "urgency": analysis.get("urgency", "Medium"),
    "suggested_response": analysis.get("suggested_response", ""),
}
    ```
  }
  parse_analysis.analysis = analyzer.response

  self.summary = parse_analysis.summary
  self.category = parse_analysis.category
  self.urgency = parse_analysis.urgency
  self.suggested_response = parse_analysis.suggested_response
}
analyze_ticket.name = user_name.value
analyze_ticket.request = user_request.value

review = HumanQuery {
  label: "Support Ticket Review"
  title: "Support Ticket Review"
  fields: [
    {"fieldType": "display", "key": "customer_name", "required": true},
    {"fieldType": "display", "key": "summary", "required": true},
    {"fieldType": "display", "key": "category"},
    {"fieldType": "display", "key": "urgency"},
    {"fieldType": "editable_textarea", "key": "draft_response", "required": true},
    {"fieldType": "text_input", "key": "reviewer_notes"},
    {"fieldType": "select_input", "key": "priority_override"},
    {
      "fieldType": "approve_reject",
      "key": "decision",
      "config": {
        "approveLabel": "Send Response",
        "rejectLabel": "Discard"
      }
    }
  ]
}
review.customer_name = user_name.value
review.summary = analyze_ticket.summary
review.category = analyze_ticket.category
review.urgency = analyze_ticket.urgency
review.draft_response = analyze_ticket.suggested_response
review.priority_override = priority_options.value

priority_options = List -> (value: List[String]) {
  label: "Priority Options"
  value: ```
[
  "Keep AI suggestion",
  "Low",
  "Medium",
  "High",
  "Escalate"
]
```
}

route_decision = Group(decision_approved: Boolean?, decision_rejected: Boolean?, draft_response: String, reviewer_notes: String?, priority_override: String?) -> (approved_response: String?, rejection_notes: String?, metadata: Dict[String, String]?) {
  # Routes the reviewer's decision through gates: approved responses
  # pass through one path, rejections through another. Also collects
  # review metadata (notes and priority override) into a single dict.

  approved_gate = Gate {
    label: "Only if Approved"
  }
  approved_gate.pass = self.decision_approved
  approved_gate.value = self.draft_response

  rejected_gate = Gate {
    label: "Only if Rejected"
  }
  rejected_gate.pass = self.decision_rejected
  rejected_gate.value = self.reviewer_notes

  review_metadata = Pack(
    notes: String?,
    priority_override: String?,
    @require_one_of(notes, priority_override)
  ) {
    label: "Review Metadata"
  }

  review_metadata.notes = self.reviewer_notes
  review_metadata.priority_override = self.priority_override

  self.approved_response = approved_gate.value
  self.rejection_notes = rejected_gate.value
  self.metadata = review_metadata.out
}
route_decision.decision_approved = review.decision_approved
route_decision.decision_rejected = review.decision_rejected
route_decision.draft_response = review.draft_response
route_decision.reviewer_notes = review.reviewer_notes
route_decision.priority_override = review.priority_override

approved_output = Debug { label: "Approved Response" }
approved_output.data = route_decision.approved_response

rejected_output = Debug { label: "Rejection Notes" }
rejected_output.data = route_decision.rejection_notes

metadata_output = Debug { label: "Full Review Metadata" }
metadata_output.data = route_decision.metadata
loomCode:
theme { skin:"default", layout:"wide", density:"comfortable" }

hero
  title:"Human-in-the-Loop Support Review"
  subtitle:"AI analyzes the ticket. You decide what gets sent."
  size:"md"
  align:"left"

section padding:"lg" background:"subtle" {
  columns cols:2 gap:"xl" {
    card padding:"lg" title:"How it works" {
      text ```
1. Fill in the customer details below and click **Run**
2. The AI analyzes the ticket and drafts a response
3. A review form appears in the **WeaveMind browser extension**
4. You approve or reject — the Gate node routes accordingly
      ```
    }
    card padding:"lg" title:"Setup checklist" {
      text ```
- Install the **WeaveMind browser extension** (Chrome / Firefox)
- Create an **API token** in your WeaveMind dashboard
- Paste the token into the extension settings
- Run this project — the extension will show a pending task
      ```
    }
  }
}

section title:"Scenario" padding:"lg" {
  columns cols:2 gap:"xl" {
    field user_name value
      as:text
      label:"Customer Name"
      description:"The customer submitting the support request."
    field user_request value
      as:textarea
      height:"180px"
      label:"Support Request"
      description:"Try different scenarios: refunds, technical issues, billing questions."
  }
  field priority_options value
    as:textarea
    height:"120px"
    label:"Priority Options"
    description:"One option per line. These appear in the reviewer's priority dropdown."
}

section title:"AI Configuration" padding:"lg" background:"subtle" {
  columns cols:3 gap:"lg" {
    field analyze_ticket.llm_config apiKey
      label:"API Key"
      description:"Your OpenRouter key. Leave empty to use platform credits."
    field analyze_ticket.llm_config model
      as:text
      label:"Model"
      description:"LLM used for ticket analysis."
    field analyze_ticket.llm_config temperature
      as:number
      label:"Temperature"
      description:"Lower = more consistent. Higher = more creative."
  }
  field analyze_ticket.llm_config systemPrompt
    as:textarea
    height:"180px"
    label:"System Prompt"
    description:"Instructions that shape how the AI analyzes and categorizes tickets."
}

cta label:"Run Analysis" action:"run" size:"lg" align:"center"

section title:"Results" padding:"lg" {
  columns cols:2 gap:"xl" {
    output approved_output data
      as:markdown
      height:"280px"
      label:"Approved Response"
      placeholder:"If the reviewer approves, the final response text will appear here."
    output rejected_output data
      as:markdown
      height:"280px"
      label:"Rejection Notes"
      placeholder:"If the reviewer rejects, their notes will appear here."
  }
  output metadata_output data
    as:json
    height:"160px"
    label:"Review Metadata"
    placeholder:"Priority override and reviewer notes will appear here."
}

footer note:"Human-in-the-Loop tutorial · WeaveMind"
